name: Go module + Echo server + config
description: Initialize the Go module, set up the Echo HTTP server entrypoint in cmd/server/, load configuration from environment variables (DATABASE_URL, STORAGE_PATH, PORT, JWT_SECRET), and expose a GET /health endpoint that returns 200 OK.
acceptance_criteria: go.mod exists with module name and Go 1.22+ requirement
cmd/server/main.go starts an Echo server on the configured PORT (default 8080)
Environment variables DATABASE_URL, STORAGE_PATH, PORT, JWT_SECRET are loaded from .env or OS env
GET /health returns HTTP 200 with JSON body {"status": "ok"}
go build -o server ./cmd/server succeeds without errors
